text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was quite the mean schedule of races, but
summer camp ended with no hiccups!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Considering how much I've run, haven't I gone
way over 3,600 meters?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A-aren't I too talented for my own good?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: However, I cannot loiter around like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will run all the way to the beach and back to put
in even more meters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Panicking, I trail after Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
choice_data_list: Stop, the bus is almost here!
Stop, the bus is almost here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Well, I must put a hold to my running then!
Class representatives cannot be tardy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I will turn back at once, whoaa?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, my speed has backfired on me! Trainer,
you're completely soaked!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Sakura Bakushin O's passionate (?)
summer camp comes to a close.
